Home / Services / Custom Cabinetry

Custom Cabinetry

Handcrafted storage solutions that fit your Chicago home's unique dimensions and style.

In Chicago's varied housing stock—from vintage bungalows to modern condos—standard cabinets often fall short. Our custom cabinetry is built to precisely fit your space, whether we're working around original 1920s architecture or maximizing every inch in a high-rise kitchen.

We design with Chicago's climate in mind, using moisture-resistant materials that withstand our humid summers. For historic homes, we can replicate original moldings and proportions, while contemporary spaces benefit from our sleek, space-saving designs. Every cabinet is constructed with solid wood frames and premium hardware that stands up to decades of use.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Precise measurements accounting for Chicago's often uneven walls and floors
  2. 02 Step 2: Material selection focused on durability against temperature fluctuations
  3. 03 Step 3: Design presentation with 3D renderings of your future kitchen
  4. 04 Step 4: Professional installation with attention to historic home preservation when needed

Benefits

  • Perfect fit for Chicago's irregular room dimensions
  • Premium materials that resist warping in humidity
  • Style continuity with your home's architecture
  • Maximized storage in compact city kitchens

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you handle cabinet installation in historic Chicago homes?

We specialize in non-invasive techniques that preserve original features while modernizing functionality. For landmark districts, we ensure all designs meet local preservation guidelines.

What cabinet materials work best for Chicago's climate?

We recommend plywood boxes with solid wood fronts—this combination resists seasonal expansion better than particleboard. For painted finishes, we use moisture-resistant primers.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with custom cabinetry? Contact us today.
